_marker: OFFLINE GATE RE-RUN (extract/computed/regate.ts) — committed captured truth replayed through the CURRENT fusion + emitters. Pixel pairs are NOT scored offline (original screenshots are session artifacts); computed-equality is the instrument. The committed scorecard.json (harness run) is untouched.

scorecard.method: enriched contract → core/emit-html (wrapped library tokens + minted token custom properties) vs the ORIGINAL npm package rendering, same pinned Chromium, per combo × interaction; computed-equality over the styled channel set (exact string, no tolerance) + pixelmatch at threshold 0 (AA counted) and 0.1 (AA excluded) — both quoted, never widened
namedLosses: overflow: icon.color — resolved values differ across variants without correlating to any variant axis — nothing minted; bind manually
